title: Planetary Signal Network: Real-Time Global AI

scenes.narration: Right now, 500 news feeds, 29 stock markets, and escalation signals are firing at once—this AI connects every single node.
scenes.title: Planetary Signal Network
scenes.subtitle: Earth's Digital Central Nervous System

scenes.narration: Our world generates an overwhelming flood of raw geopolitical and market noise every single second.
World Monitor aggregates these streams into a unified central nervous system for live situational awareness.
With over 68,000 stars, the repository provides core architecture docs, Docker setups, and local agents.

repo.name: worldmonitor
repo.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situ
readme: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical
monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
- 500+ curated news feeds across 15 categories, AI-synthesized into briefs
- Dual map engine — 3D globe globe.gl and WebGL flat map deck.gl with 56 map layer types
- Cross-stream correlation — military, economic, disaster, and escalation signal convergence
- Finance radar — 29 stock exchanges, commodities, crypto, and 7-signal market composite
- Local AI — run everything with Ollama, no API keys required
TypeScript, agent, ai, dashboard, geopolitics, mcp, mcp-server, monitoring

scenes.narration: Luminescent data pulses travel across the network as over 500 curated news streams wire directly in.
Fifteen distinct categories feed continuous global events straight into an intelligent processing engine.
scenes.title: Stream Aggregation

scenes.narration: The system projects these global signals directly onto an interactive three-dimensional digital model.
It pairs a 3D globe.gl model with deck.gl WebGL rendering across 56 distinct map layers.
Cross-stream algorithms detect convergence between military movements, natural disasters, and real-time infrastructure status.
scenes.title: Cross-Stream Correlation

scenes.narration: Its finance radar tracks twenty-nine stock exchanges, commodities, crypto, and a seven-signal composite.
You can plug these streams straight into AI using MCP without requiring external API keys.
Simply clone the repository, install dependencies, and run the local development server in seconds.
Raw global noise is instantly synthesized into clear executive intelligence briefs by local AI models.
Every pulse of information is translated into action-ready situational awareness before your eyes.
Launch specialized dashboards tailored for tech trends, financial markets, or global energy infrastructure.
scenes.title: Targeted Dashboards

scenes.narration: The entire planet now operates as a single live organism transmitting data directly to you.
Check out the repo on GitHub today and start reading Earth's live digital pulse.
scenes.title: Explore World Monitor
